name: Embolist
description: A living weapon, the infested Embolist pistol kills its victims with an acidic venomous gas.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: A living weapon, the infested Embolist pistol kills its victims with an acidic venomous gas.

components.name: Circuits
components.description:
Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Mutagen Mass
components.description:
This living mass can produce weaponized toxins for weaponry.

Location: Clan Research (Bio Lab in the Dojo) and Infested Outbreak Invasion Rewards

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Lua’s Prey: Baruuk Prime: Hotfix 32.2.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed offset issues with the Embolist Leg Growths Armor and Galvanik Leg Plates when equipped on Baruuk Prime.

patchlogs.name: Nora’s Mix Vol.2: Hotfix 31.6.4
patchlogs.changes: Vile Discharge (Embolist): Damage is accumulated up to 30,000. Use Alt-fire to launch an explosive vile sac dealing and resetting the accumulated damage.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.14.0
patchlogs.changes:
Embolist
Embolist ammo capacity increased to 50 in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Update 21.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Embolist chest piece clipping into the Nyx Immortal, Saikou, Athena, and Carnifex Skins.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview: Hotfix #3
patchlogs.changes: You can now purchase the Embolist Armor separately.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes:
Amprex, Flux Rifle, Glaxion, Embolist, Gammacor series, Nukor, Spectra, Panthera, Synapse, Sobek, Drakgoon and Lanka can now be used in Conclave!
The Embolist has received the PBR treatment!
patchlogs.fixes:
Embolist Armour Bundle 
Embolist Collection 
This collection of unnatural, malformed, Infested growths contains; the Caustacyst Scythe, the Embolist Pistol, Tentacyst accessory for melee weapons and the Embolist Armor.

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.additions: Added custom weapon reloads to a variety of weapons that were re-using old reloads (Snipetron, Embolist, ec).

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Grakata, Prisma Grakata, and Embolist improperly using the Ignis’ reload animation.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Improved the smokey particle effects on the Embolist’s weapon fire.

patchlogs.name: Update 12: Zephyr Rises
patchlogs.changes: Embolist now has increased damage and forced poison proc.

patchlogs.name: Update 10.3.0: Hump Day!
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed continuous fire AoE weapons (Ignis, Embolist) from hitting the same target multiple times per shot when in ragdoll.
Fixed weapons that played reload sounds twice (Ignis, Grakata, Embolist)
